LocationIds.description: The IDs of the locations where the gift card is sold.

Description.description: A description of the gift card.
Description.example: Example note for Mindbody Public API.

EditableByConsumer.description: When `true`, indicates that the gift card can be edited by the client.

CardValue.description: The value of the gift card.

SalePrice.description: The sale price of the gift card, if applicable.

SoldOnline.description: When `true`, indicates that the gift card is sold online.

MembershipRestrictionIds.description: A list of IDs for membership restrictions, if this card is restricted to members with certain types of memberships.

GiftCardTerms.description: The terms of the gift card.

ContactInfo.description: Contact information for the gift card.

DisplayLogo.description: When `true`, indicates that the logo should be displayed on the gift card.

Layouts.description: A list of layouts available for the gift card.
